decisions.name: Layered Architecture
decisions.rationale: The system will be designed using a layered (N-Tier) architecture style to ensure a clear separation of concerns, scalability, and maintainability.

decisions.name: Python Library for CV Parsing
decisions.rationale: The system will use a Python library to parse CVs and extract key information such as skills and years of experience.

decisions.name: Cosine Similarity and Jaccard Similarity for CV Comparison
decisions.rationale: The system will use cosine similarity and Jaccard similarity to assess the alignment between the extracted information from the CV and the job requirements specified by the recruiter.

decisions.name: Expert-Generated Model for Applicant Response Validation
decisions.rationale: Applicant responses will be verified and graded by comparing them to an expert-generated model, and the applicant's answers will be validated and scored by ChatGPT.

decisions.name: Percentage-Based Result Generation
decisions.rationale: The system will generate a percentage-based result that represents the applicant's overall suitability for the role by averaging CV ranking and screening question validation scores.

components.name: CV Parser
components.responsibility: Parse and extract key information from the applicant's CV

components.name: Screening Question Validator
components.responsibility: Verify and grade applicant responses against an expert-generated model

components.name: Cosine Similarity Calculator
components.responsibility: Assess the alignment between CV information and job requirements using cosine similarity

components.name: Jaccard Similarity Calculator
components.responsibility: Assess the alignment between CV information and job requirements using Jaccard similarity

components.name: Rating Generator
components.responsibility: Generate a percentage-based result representing the applicant's overall suitability for the role

components.name: CV Comparison Module
components.responsibility: Compare CV information with job requirements and generate a ranking

components.name: ChatGPT Validator
components.responsibility: Validate and score applicant responses using ChatGPT

components.name: Submit CV Module
components.responsibility: Allow applicants to submit their CVs for parsing and analysis

components.name: View and Edit CV Module
components.responsibility: Enable applicants to view and edit their parsed CV

components.name: Answer Screening Questions Module
components.responsibility: Present applicants with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter

components.name: Get Rating for CV Module
components.responsibility: Provide applicants with a rating for their submitted CV
